.single-post .jit_singlepost_container,
.single-podcast .jit_singlepost_container,
.single-column .jit_singlepost_container {
    padding: 5px !important;
}


.single .content-inner {
    color: #333;
    font-size: 19px;
    line-height: 1.525em;
    word-break: normal;
    -ms-word-wrap: break-word;
    word-wrap: break-word;
}

.single-post .jeg_content .jit_singlepost_container .content-inner, .single-podcast .jeg_content .jit_singlepost_container .content-inner, .single-column .jeg_content .jit_singlepost_container .content-inner 
{
    font-size: 23px;
    font-family: "Literata",sans-serif !important;
    color: #101119;
}

usercssData.name: Dark Instagram(Wide Screen Message)By Ragab Hesham
usercssData.author: Ragab Hesham
usercssData.description:
This theme is designed to make the desktop version of Instagram look and feel like Instagram's Dark Theme on mobile, while also providing a widescreen fix for Direct Messages and other parts of Instagram's UI. Compatible with www.instagram.com and the Instagram "app" from the Microsoft Store (it's just the webpage running in Edge browser lol) www.ragabhesham.ml Download IMedia Saver App, it has many download features from 103 Sites.
https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.ra.imediasaver
